title: FlareFryze PvP+FPS Modpack
description: A clean PvP-focused modpack with performance optimizations and essential utilities for competitive gameplay (1.21+).
body:
![PVP + FPS ESSENTIALS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09e507480def19112621b772a027a43743168bc6.png)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Built for PvPers and FPS-focused players.
This modpack is designed for competitive Minecraft PvP with full performance optimization and clean PvP visuals.

Only essential combat, FPS, and quality-of-life mods are included — no useless junk, no bloat.
Everything in this pack directly improves PvP gameplay, clarity, and responsiveness.

# 🎥 Showcase
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/bBklcDYW2Mc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


## 🔑 Key Features

- PvP + FPS Focus
- Optimized for smooth gameplay and high FPS
- Performance mods tuned for competitive combat
- Clean visuals with zero distractions
- PvP Resource Packs (All Game Modes)
- SMP PvP
- UHC
- Netherite PvP
- Crystal PvP
- Mace PvP
- Vanilla-style PvP

### Included PvP packs:

- UHC Basics
- MacePvP Essentials
- Neth Essentials
- SMP Basics
- SMP Utils
- PvP Essentials 1.21+
- PvP Utils
- CPVP Essentials (Crystal PvP)
- Vanilla PvP Essentials
- PvP Practice Content
- Dedicated PvP practice maps included
- Useful for training mechanics and combat scenarios
- Clean Mod Selection
- Combat and PvP utility mods
- FPS and performance optimization mods
- Essential QoL improvements only
- No gameplay-altering or unnecessary features
